the Moon's place at germination will roincide with the descen-

84 Rectification of Birth Time
dant of the birth chart. There are other possibilities also. Thus
if the duration of the pregnancy is 8 112 or 9 112 lunation, the
Moon at germination will be as the descendant of the birth
chart, when the Moon is behind the Sun.
Take the distance of the Moon for the lagna or from .the
seventh house. If the Moon is below the horizon, the count is
from lagna, and if above the count is from the seventh. Divide
this figure by thirteen which is the average daily motion of the
Moon. The product is to be added to 273 days. Counting back
wards we get the date of the germination.
Take the example of a birth as 1920.1.22 at 11.06 A.M.
UST). The Moon was on 289 deg.44'.35" and the Sun on 278
deg.10'.3". The Moon is above the horizon. The seventh house
is on 175 deg.45' .35". From the seventh house the Moon was
away by 113 deg.58'.
